@@ -22,6 +23,71 @@
     model.load_state_dict(clean, strict=True)

     model.eval()

     return model

+

+

+class LegacyHotspotCNN(nn.Module):

+    def __init__(self, vocab_size, emb_dim, conv1_out, conv2_out, kernel1, kernel2, groups1, groups2, dropout, fc_in):

+        super().__init__()

+        self.embed = nn.Embedding(vocab_size, emb_dim)

+        self.conv1 = nn.Conv1d(emb_dim + 1, conv1_out, kernel_size=kernel1, padding=kernel1 // 2, groups=groups1)

+        self.conv2 = nn.Conv1d(conv1_out, conv2_out, kernel_size=kernel2, padding=kernel2 // 2, groups=groups2)

+        self.act = nn.GELU()

+        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)

+        self.fc1 = nn.Linear(fc_in, 64)

+        self.fc2 = nn.Linear(64, 1)

+

+    def forward(self, tok, mut):

+        x = self.embed(tok).transpose(1, 2)

+        m = mut.float().unsqueeze(1)

+        x = torch.cat([x, m], dim=1)

+        x = self.act(self.conv1(x))

+        x = self.act(self.conv2(x))

+        avg = x.mean(dim=-1)

+        mx = x.amax(dim=-1)

+        feat = torch.cat([avg, mx], dim=1)

+        feat = self.dropout(self.act(self.fc1(feat)))

+        return self.fc2(feat).squeeze(-1)

+

+

+class LegacyESMHead(nn.Module):

+    def __init__(self, in_dim, hidden):

+        super().__init__()

+        self.net = nn.Sequential(

+            nn.Linear(in_dim, hidden),

+            nn.GELU(),

+            nn.Dropout(0.1),

+            nn.Linear(hidden, 1),

+        )

+

+    def forward(self, x):

+        return self.net(x).squeeze(-1)

+

+

+def infer_cnn_from_state(state):

+    s = {k: (v if isinstance(v, torch.Tensor) else torch.as_tensor(v)) for k, v in state.items()}

+    emb_w = s['embed.weight']

+    vocab_size, emb_dim = emb_w.shape

+    conv1_w = s['conv1.weight']

+    conv2_w = s['conv2.weight']

+    fc1_w = s['fc1.weight']

+    conv1_out = conv1_w.shape[0]

+    kernel1 = conv1_w.shape[2]

+    groups1 = (emb_dim + 1) // conv1_w.shape[1]

+    conv2_out = conv2_w.shape[0]

+    kernel2 = conv2_w.shape[2]

+    groups2 = conv1_out // conv2_w.shape[1]

+    fc_in = fc1_w.shape[1]

+    model = LegacyHotspotCNN(vocab_size, emb_dim, conv1_out, conv2_out, kernel1, kernel2, groups1, groups2, 0.1, fc_in)

+    return load_state_flexible(model, s)

+

+

+def infer_esm_head_from_state(state):

+    s = {k: (v if isinstance(v, torch.Tensor) else torch.as_tensor(v)) for k, v in state.items()}

+    w1 = s['net.0.weight']

+    in_dim = w1.shape[1]

+    hidden = w1.shape[0]

+    model = LegacyESMHead(in_dim, hidden)

+    return load_state_flexible(model, s)
